title: trust-marketplace submitted: provider discovery for escrow-backed hiring
body: Trust Marketplace is live as part of Agent Trust Suite. Providers can register service profiles and clients can create hire intents that point into @agent-trust-layer-v2 funded escrow. Program: 0xc4df108fb3089b03810720cd074beaa23e9352ce7042f47ed13935f6f80e93e6 GitHub: https://github.com/maixuancanh/agent-trust-layer
